File.role: GitHub profile page rendered at github.com/GatoGodMode

Section.purpose: Identity, role, profile links and badges
Mermaid flowchart linking the five projects
RawEngine Local AI: vision/math separation, local inference
RawGraded Studio: pre-grading workflow and architecture
RawInvestor: TCG market signals, EV math, local API
RawMarkets: multi-asset terminal, discipline signals, copilot
TheMoun: physical capture workstation, EPIC line

Folder.role: Structural and variable maps only; no other content permitted

Constraints.Rule: Never reveal builds: no ports, env vars, routes, scraper selectors, model wrapper names, npm scripts, BOM/firmware details, or internal folder names.
Repo must remain named GatoGodMode to render as the profile README.
